*field* enhance\_input\_image\_:  `Optional`\[`bool`]\_ *=  None* *(alias 'enhanceInputImage')*[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfig.enhance_input_image "Link to this definition")

Whether to add an image enhancing step before upscaling. It is expected to suppress the noise and JPEG compression artifacts from the input image.

Validated by:

* `_check_field_type_mismatches`

*field* http\_options\_:  `Optional`\[[`HttpOptions`](#genai.types.HttpOptions "genai.types.HttpOptions")]\_ *=  None* *(alias 'httpOptions')*[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfig.http_options "Link to this definition")

Used to override HTTP request options.

Validated by:

* `_check_field_type_mismatches`

*field* image\_preservation\_factor\_:  `Optional`\[`float`]\_ *=  None* *(alias 'imagePreservationFactor')*[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfig.image_preservation_factor "Link to this definition")

With a higher image preservation factor, the original image pixels are more respected. With a lower image preservation factor, the output image will have be more different from the input image, but with finer details and less noise.

Validated by:

* `_check_field_type_mismatches`

*field* include\_rai\_reason\_:  `Optional`\[`bool`]\_ *=  None* *(alias 'includeRaiReason')*[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfig.include_rai_reason "Link to this definition")

Validated by:

*class* genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict "Link to this definition")

Bases: `TypedDict`

Configuration for upscaling an image.

For more information on this configuration, refer to the [Imagen API reference documentation](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/generative-ai/docs/model-reference/imagen-api).

enhance\_input\_image\_:  `Optional`\[`bool`]\_[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict.enhance_input_image "Link to this definition")

Whether to add an image enhancing step before upscaling. It is expected to suppress the noise and JPEG compression artifacts from the input image.

http\_options\_:  `Optional`\[[`HttpOptionsDict`](#genai.types.HttpOptionsDict "genai.types.HttpOptionsDict")]\_[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict.http_options "Link to this definition")

Used to override HTTP request options.

image\_preservation\_factor\_:  `Optional`\[`float`]\_[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict.image_preservation_factor "Link to this definition")

With a higher image preservation factor, the original image pixels are more respected. With a lower image preservation factor, the output image will have be more different from the input image, but with finer details and less noise.

include\_rai\_reason\_:  `Optional`\[`bool`]\_[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict.include_rai_reason "Link to this definition")

Whether to include a reason for filtered-out images in the response.

labels\_:  `Optional`\[`dict`\[`str`, `str`]]\_[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict.labels "Link to this definition")

User specified labels to track billing usage.

output\_compression\_quality\_:  `Optional`\[`int`]\_[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict.output_compression_quality "Link to this definition")

The level of compression. Only applicable if the `output_mime_type` is `image/jpeg`.

output\_gcs\_uri\_:  `Optional`\[`str`]\_[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict.output_gcs_uri "Link to this definition")

Cloud Storage URI used to store the generated images.

output\_mime\_type\_:  `Optional`\[`str`]\_[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict.output_mime_type "Link to this definition")

The image format that the output should be saved as.

person\_generation\_:  `Optional`\[[`PersonGeneration`](#genai.types.PersonGeneration "genai.types.PersonGeneration")]\_[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict.person_generation "Link to this definition")

Allows generation of people by the model.

safety\_filter\_level\_:  `Optional`\[[`SafetyFilterLevel`](#genai.types.SafetyFilterLevel "genai.types.SafetyFilterLevel")]\_[¶](#genai.types.UpscaleImageConfigDict.safety_filter_level "Link to this definition")

Filter level for safety filtering.

*class* genai.types.UrlRetrievalStatus(*\*values*)[¶](#genai.types.UrlRetrievalStatus "Link to this definition")

Bases: `CaseInSensitiveEnum`

Status of the url retrieval.

URL\_RETRIEVAL\_STATUS\_ERROR *=  'URL\_RETRIEVAL\_STATUS\_ERROR'*[¶](#genai.types.UrlRetrievalStatus.URL_RETRIEVAL_STATUS_ERROR "Link to this definition")

Url retrieval is failed due to error.

URL\_RETRIEVAL\_STATUS\_PAYWALL *=  'URL\_RETRIEVAL\_STATUS\_PAYWALL'*[¶](#genai.types.UrlRetrievalStatus.URL_RETRIEVAL_STATUS_PAYWALL "Link to this definition")

Url retrieval is failed because the content is behind paywall. This enum value is not supported in Vertex AI.

URL\_RETRIEVAL\_STATUS\_SUCCESS *=  'URL\_RETRIEVAL\_STATUS\_SUCCESS'*[¶](#genai.types.UrlRetrievalStatus.URL_RETRIEVAL_STATUS_SUCCESS "Link to this definition")

Url retrieval is successful.

URL\_RETRIEVAL\_STATUS\_UNSAFE *=  'URL\_RETRIEVAL\_STATUS\_UNSAFE'*[¶](#genai.types.UrlRetrievalStatus.URL_RETRIEVAL_STATUS_UNSAFE "Link to this definition")

Url retrieval is failed because the content is unsafe. This enum value is not supported in Vertex AI.

URL\_RETRIEVAL\_STATUS\_UNSPECIFIED *=  'URL\_RETRIEVAL\_STATUS\_UNSPECIFIED'*[¶](#genai.types.UrlRetrievalStatus.URL_RETRIEVAL_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED "Link to this definition")

Default value. This value is unused.

*pydantic model* genai.types.UserContent[¶](#genai.types.UserContent "Link to this definition")

Bases: [`Content`](#genai.types.Content "genai.types.Content")

UserContent facilitates the creation of a Content object with a user role.

Example usages:

* Create a user Content object with a string: user\_content = UserContent(“Why is the sky blue?”)

* Create a user Content object with a file data Part object: user\_content = UserContent(Part.from\_uri(file\_uril=”gs://bucket/file.txt”, mime\_type=”text/plain”))

* Create a user Content object with byte data Part object: user\_content = UserContent(Part.from\_bytes(data=b”Hello, World!”, mime\_type=”text/plain”))

  You can create a user Content object using other classmethods in the Part class as well. You can also create a user Content using a list of Part objects or strings.

Create a new model by parsing and validating input data from keyword arguments.

Raises \[ValidationError]\[pydantic\_core.ValidationError] if the input data cannot be validated to form a valid model.

self is explicitly positional-only to allow self as a field name.

Show JSON schema

{
"title":  "UserContent",
"description":  "UserContent facilitates the creation of a Content object with a user role.\n\nExample usages:\n\n\n- Create a user Content object with a string:\n  user\_content = UserContent(\\"Why is the sky blue?\\")\n- Create a user Content object with a file data Part object:\n  user\_content = UserContent(Part.from\_uri(file\_uril=\\"gs://bucket/file.txt\\",\n  mime\_type=\\"text/plain\\"))\n- Create a user Content object with byte data Part object:\n  user\_content = UserContent(Part.from\_bytes(data=b\\"Hello, World!\\",\n  mime\_type=\\"text/plain\\"))\n\n  You can create a user Content object using other classmethods in the Part\n  class as well.\n  You can also create a user Content using a list of Part objects or strings.",
"type":  "object",
"properties":  {
"parts":  {
"items":  {
"$ref":  "#/$defs/Part"
},
"title":  "Parts",
"type":  "array"
},
"role":  {
"const":  "user",
"default":  "user",
"title":  "Role",
"type":  "string"
}
},
"$defs":  {
"Blob":  {
"additionalProperties":  false,
"description":  "Content blob.",
"properties":  {
"data":  {
"anyOf":  \[
{
"format":  "base64url",
"type":  "string"
},
{
"type":  "null"
}
],
"default":  null,
"description":  "Required. Raw bytes.",
"title":  "Data"
},
"displayName":  {
"anyOf":  \[
{
"type":  "string"
},
{
"type":  "null"
}
],
"default":  null,
"description":  "Optional. Display name of the blob. Used to provide a label or filename to distinguish blobs. This field is only returned in PromptMessage for prompt management. "willContinue":  {
"anyOf":  \[
{
"type":  "boolean"
},
{
"type":  "null"
}
],
"default":  null,
"description":  "Signals that function call continues, and more responses will be returned, turning the function call into a generator. Is only applicable to NON\_BLOCKING function calls (see FunctionDeclaration.behavior for details), ignored otherwise. If false, the default, future responses will not be considered. Is only applicable to NON\_BLOCKING function calls, is ignored otherwise. If set to false, future responses will not be considered. It is allowed to return empty \`response\` with \`will\_continue=False\` to signal that the function call is finished.",
"title":  "Willcontinue"
},

*class* genai.types.VadSignalType(*\*values*)[¶](#genai.types.VadSignalType "Link to this definition")

Bases: `CaseInSensitiveEnum`

The type of the VAD signal.

VAD\_SIGNAL\_TYPE\_EOS *=  'VAD\_SIGNAL\_TYPE\_EOS'*[¶](#genai.types.VadSignalType.VAD_SIGNAL_TYPE_EOS "Link to this definition")

End of sentence signal.

VAD\_SIGNAL\_TYPE\_SOS *=  'VAD\_SIGNAL\_TYPE\_SOS'*[¶](#genai.types.VadSignalType.VAD_SIGNAL_TYPE_SOS "Link to this definition")

Start of sentence signal.

VAD\_SIGNAL\_TYPE\_UNSPECIFIED *=  'VAD\_SIGNAL\_TYPE\_UNSPECIFIED'*[¶](#genai.types.VadSignalType.VAD_SIGNAL_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED "Link to this definition")

The default is VAD\_SIGNAL\_TYPE\_UNSPECIFIED.

*pydantic model* genai.types.VeoHyperParameters[¶](#genai.types.VeoHyperParameters "Link to this definition")

Bases: `BaseModel`

Hyperparameters for Veo. This data type is not supported in Gemini API.

Create a new model by parsing and validating input data from keyword arguments.

Raises \[ValidationError]\[pydantic\_core.ValidationError] if the input data cannot be validated to form a valid model.

self is explicitly positional-only to allow self as a field name.

Show JSON schema

{
"title":  "VeoHyperParameters",
"description":  "Hyperparameters for Veo. This data type is not supported in Gemini API.",
"type":  "object",
"properties":  {
"epochCount":  {
"anyOf":  \[
{
"type":  "integer"
},
{
"type":  "null"
}
],
"default":  null,
"description":  "Optional. Number of complete passes the model makes over the entire training dataset during training.",
"title":  "Epochcount"
},
"learningRateMultiplier":  {
"anyOf":  \[
{
"type":  "number"
},
{
"type":  "null"
}
],
"default":  null,
"description":  "Optional. Multiplier for adjusting the default learning rate.",
"title":  "Learningratemultiplier"
},
"tuningTask":  {
"anyOf":  \[
{
"$ref":  "#/$defs/TuningTask"
},
{
"type":  "null"
}
],
"default":  null,
"description":  "Optional. The tuning task. Either I2V or T2V."
}
},
"$defs":  {
"TuningTask":  {
"description":  "The tuning task.\n\nEither I2V or T2V. This enum is not supported in Gemini API.",
"enum":  \[
"TUNING\_TASK\_UNSPECIFIED",
"TUNING\_TASK\_I2V",
"TUNING\_TASK\_T2V",
"TUNING\_TASK\_R2V"
],
"title":  "TuningTask",
"type":  "string"
}
},
"additionalProperties":  false
}

Hyperparameters for Veo. This data type is not supported in Gemini API.

epoch\_count\_:  `Optional`\[`int`]\_[¶](#genai.types.VeoHyperParametersDict.epoch_count "Link to this definition")

Optional. Number of complete passes the model makes over the entire training dataset during training.

learning\_rate\_multiplier\_:  `Optional`\[`float`]\_[¶](#genai.types.VeoHyperParametersDict.learning_rate_multiplier "Link to this definition")

Optional. Multiplier for adjusting the default learning rate.

tuning\_task\_:  `Optional`\[[`TuningTask`](#genai.types.TuningTask "genai.types.TuningTask")]\_[¶](#genai.types.VeoHyperParametersDict.tuning_task "Link to this definition")

Optional. The tuning task. Either I2V or T2V.

*pydantic model* genai.types.VeoTuningSpec[¶](#genai.types.VeoTuningSpec "Link to this definition")

Bases: `BaseModel`

Tuning Spec for Veo Model Tuning.

This data type is not supported in Gemini API.

Create a new model by parsing and validating input data from keyword arguments.

Raises \[ValidationError]\[pydantic\_core.ValidationError] if the input data cannot be validated to form a valid model.

self is explicitly positional-only to allow self as a field name.

*pydantic model* genai.types.VertexAISearch[¶](#genai.types.VertexAISearch "Link to this definition")

Bases: `BaseModel`

Retrieve from Vertex AI Search datastore or engine for grounding.

datastore and engine are mutually exclusive. See <https://cloud.google.com/products/agent-builder>. This data type is not supported in Gemini API.

Create a new model by parsing and validating input data from keyword arguments.

Raises \[ValidationError]\[pydantic\_core.ValidationError] if the input data cannot be validated to form a valid model.

self is explicitly positional-only to allow self as a field name.

Show JSON schema

{
"title":  "VertexAISearch",
"description":  "Retrieve from Vertex AI Search datastore or engine for grounding.\n\ndatastore and engine are mutually exclusive. See\nhttps://cloud.google.com/products/agent-builder. This data type is not\nsupported in Gemini API.",
"type":  "object",
"properties":  {
"dataStoreSpecs":  {
"anyOf":  \[
{
"items":  {
"$ref":  "#/$defs/VertexAISearchDataStoreSpec"
},
"type":  "array"
},
{
"type":  "null"
}
],
"default":  null,
"description":  "Specifications that define the specific DataStores to be searched, along with configurations for those data stores. This is only considered for Engines with multiple data stores. It should only be set if engine is used.",
"title":  "Datastorespecs"
},

"anyOf":  \[

"type":  "string"
},
{
"type":  "null"
}
],
"default":  null,

},

"anyOf":  \[

}
],
"default":  null,

"filter":  {
"anyOf":  \[

}
],
"default":  null,
"description":  "Optional. Filter strings to be passed to the search API.",
"title":  "Filter"
},
"maxResults":  {
"anyOf":  \[
{
"type":  "integer"
},
{
"type":  "null"
}
],
"default":  null,
"description":  "Optional. Number of search results to return per query. The default value is 10. The maximumm allowed value is 10.",
"title":  "Maxresults"
}
},
"$defs":  {
"VertexAISearchDataStoreSpec":  {
"additionalProperties":  false,
"description":  "Define data stores within engine to filter on in a search call and configurations for those data stores.\n\nFor more information, see\nhttps://cloud.google.com/generative-ai-app-builder/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.discoveryengine.v1#datastorespec.\nThis data type is not supported in Gemini API.",

"anyOf":  \[
{
"type":  "string"
},
{
"type":  "null"
}
],
"default":  null,

"title":  "Datastore"
},
"filter":  {
"anyOf":  \[
{
"type":  "string"
},
{
"type":  "null"
}
],
"default":  null,
"description":  "Optional. Filter specification to filter documents in the data store specified by data\_store field. For more information on filtering, see \[Filtering]\(https://cloud.google.com/generative-ai-app-builder/docs/filter-search-metadata)",

Validators:

*field* rag\_corpora\_:  `Optional`\[`list`\[`str`]]\_ *=  None* *(alias 'ragCorpora')*[¶](#genai.types.VertexRagStore.rag_corpora "Link to this definition")

Optional. Deprecated. Please use rag\_resources instead.

Validated by:

* `_check_field_type_mismatches`

*field* rag\_resources\_:  `Optional`\[`list`\[[`VertexRagStoreRagResource`](#genai.types.VertexRagStoreRagResource "genai.types.VertexRagStoreRagResource")]]\_ *=  None* *(alias 'ragResources')*[¶](#genai.types.VertexRagStore.rag_resources "Link to this definition")

Optional. The representation of the rag source. It can be used to specify corpus only or ragfiles. Currently only support one corpus or multiple files from one corpus. In the future we may open up multiple corpora support.

Validated by:

* `_check_field_type_mismatches`

*field* rag\_retrieval\_config\_:  `Optional`\[[`RagRetrievalConfig`](#genai.types.RagRetrievalConfig "genai.types.RagRetrievalConfig")]\_ *=  None* *(alias 'ragRetrievalConfig')*[¶](#genai.types.VertexRagStore.rag_retrieval_config "Link to this definition")

Optional. The retrieval config for the Rag query.

Validated by:

* `_check_field_type_mismatches`

*field* similarity\_top\_k\_:  `Optional`\[`int`]\_ *=  None* *(alias 'similarityTopK')*[¶](#genai.types.VertexRagStore.similarity_top_k "Link to this definition")

Optional. Number of top k results to return from the selected corpora.

Validated by:

* `_check_field_type_mismatches`

*field* store\_context\_:  `Optional`\[`bool`]\_ *=  None* *(alias 'storeContext')*[¶](#genai.types.VertexRagStore.store_context "Link to this definition")

Optional. Currently only supported for Gemini Multimodal Live API. In Gemini Multimodal Live API, if store\_context bool is specified, Gemini will leverage it to automatically memorize the interactions between the client and Gemini, and retrieve context when needed to augment the response generation for users’ ongoing and future interactions.

Validated by:

* `_check_field_type_mismatches`

*field* vector\_distance\_threshold\_:  `Optional`\[`float`]\_ *=  None* *(alias 'vectorDistanceThreshold')*[¶](#genai.types.VertexRagStore.vector_distance_threshold "Link to this definition")

Optional. Only return results with vector distance smaller than the threshold.

Validated by:

* `_check_field_type_mismatches`

*classmethod* from\_file(*\**, *location*, *mime\_type=None*)[¶](#genai.types.Video.from_file "Link to this definition")

Loads a video from a local file.

Return type:

[`Video`](#genai.types.Video "genai.types.Video")

Parameters:

* **location** – The local path to load the video from.

* **mime\_type** – The MIME type of the video. If not provided, the MIME type will be automatically determined.

Returns:

A loaded video as an Video object.

save(*path*)[¶](#genai.types.Video.save "Link to this definition")

Saves the video to a file.

Return type:

`None`

Parameters:

**path** – Local path where to save the video.

show()[¶](#genai.types.Video.show "Link to this definition")

Shows the video.

If the video has no mime\_type, it is assumed to be video/mp4.

This method only works in a notebook environment.

Return type:

`None`

*class* genai.types.VideoCompressionQuality(*\*values*)[¶](#genai.types.VideoCompressionQuality "Link to this definition")

Bases: `CaseInSensitiveEnum`

Enum that controls the compression quality of the generated videos.

LOSSLESS *=  'LOSSLESS'*[¶](#genai.types.VideoCompressionQuality.LOSSLESS "Link to this definition")

Lossless video compression quality. This will produce videos with a larger file size.

OPTIMIZED *=  'OPTIMIZED'*[¶](#genai.types.VideoCompressionQuality.OPTIMIZED "Link to this definition")

Optimized video compression quality. This will produce videos with a compressed, smaller file size.

Video bytes.

*class* genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskDict[¶](#genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskDict "Link to this definition")

Bases: `TypedDict`

A mask for video generation.

image\_:  `Optional`\[[`ImageDict`](#genai.types.ImageDict "genai.types.ImageDict")]\_[¶](#genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskDict.image "Link to this definition")

The image mask to use for generating videos.

mask\_mode\_:  `Optional`\[[`VideoGenerationMaskMode`](#genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskMode "genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskMode")]\_[¶](#genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskDict.mask_mode "Link to this definition")

Describes how the mask will be used. Inpainting masks must match the aspect ratio of the input video. Outpainting masks can be either 9:16 or 16:9.

*class* genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskMode(*\*values*)[¶](#genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskMode "Link to this definition")

Bases: `CaseInSensitiveEnum`

Enum for the mask mode of a video generation mask.

INSERT *=  'INSERT'*[¶](#genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskMode.INSERT "Link to this definition")

The image mask contains a masked rectangular region which is applied on the first frame of the input video. The object described in the prompt is inserted into this region and will appear in subsequent frames.

OUTPAINT *=  'OUTPAINT'*[¶](#genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskMode.OUTPAINT "Link to this definition")

The image mask contains a masked rectangular region where the input video will go. The remaining area will be generated. Video masks are not supported.

REMOVE *=  'REMOVE'*[¶](#genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskMode.REMOVE "Link to this definition")

The image mask is used to determine an object in the first video frame to track. This object is removed from the video.

REMOVE\_STATIC *=  'REMOVE\_STATIC'*[¶](#genai.types.VideoGenerationMaskMode.REMOVE_STATIC "Link to this definition")

The image mask is used to determine a region in the video. Objects in this region will be removed.

*class* genai.types.VideoGenerationReferenceType(*\*values*)[¶](#genai.types.VideoGenerationReferenceType "Link to this definition")

Bases: `CaseInSensitiveEnum`

Enum for the reference type of a video generation reference image.

ASSET *=  'ASSET'*[¶](#genai.types.VideoGenerationReferenceType.ASSET "Link to this definition")

A reference image that provides assets to the generated video, such as the scene, an object, a character, etc.

STYLE *=  'STYLE'*[¶](#genai.types.VideoGenerationReferenceType.STYLE "Link to this definition")

A reference image that provides aesthetics including colors, lighting, texture, etc., to be used as the style of the generated video, such as ‘anime’, ‘photography’, ‘origami’, etc.

*field* weight\_:  `Optional`\[`float`]\_ *=  None*[¶](#genai.types.WeightedPrompt.weight "Link to this definition")

Weight of the prompt. The weight is used to control the relative importance of the prompt. Higher weights are more important than lower weights.

Weight must not be 0. Weights of all weighted\_prompts in this LiveMusicClientContent message will be normalized.

Validated by:

* `_check_field_type_mismatches`

Weight of the prompt. The weight is used to control the relative importance of the prompt. Higher weights are more important than lower weights.

Weight must not be 0. Weights of all weighted\_prompts in this LiveMusicClientContent message will be normalized.
